					<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-subjectpageheader">
</div><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="en" dir="ltr"><p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p>
<div class="shortdescription nomobile noexcerpt noprint searchaux" style="display:none">List of squads for men's international team for FIFA World Cup 2026</div>
<p>

The <a href="/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup" title="2026 FIFA World Cup">2026 FIFA World Cup</a> is an ongoing international <a href="/wiki/Association_football" title="Association football">football</a> tournament being held in Canada, Mexico, and the United States, from June 11 to July 19, 2026. The 48 national teams involved in the tournament were required to register a squad of up to 26 players, including three goalkeepers. Only players in these squads will be eligible to take part in the tournament.<sup id="cite_ref-regulations_1-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-regulations-1"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>1<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p><p>A provisional release list of between 35 and 55 players per national team had to be submitted to FIFA by May 11, 2026, one month prior to the opening match of the tournament. The release lists were not made public by FIFA. From the preliminary squad, the final list of at least 23 and at most 26 players (at least three of whom
shall be goalkeepers) per national team had to be submitted to FIFA by June 1, ten days prior to the opening match of the tournament.<sup id="cite_ref-2" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-2"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>2<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The squad lists were published by FIFA the following day.<sup id="cite_ref-3" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-3"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>3<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> In the event that a player on the submitted squad list suffers from an injury or illness prior to his team's first match of the tournament, that player could be replaced at any time up to 24 hours before their first match. The team doctor and the FIFA General Medical Officer have to both confirm that the injury or illness is severe enough to prevent the player from participating in the tournament. Replacement players are limited to the preliminary list.<sup id="cite_ref-regulations_1-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-regulations-1"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>1<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p><p>The position listed for each player is per the official squad list published by FIFA. The age listed for each player is as of June 11, 2026, the first day of the tournament. The numbers of <a href="/wiki/Cap_(sport)" title="Cap (sport)">caps</a> and goals listed for each player do not include any matches played after the start of the tournament. The club listed is the club for which the player last played a competitive match prior to the tournament.<sup id="cite_ref-4" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-4"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>note 1<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The nationality for each club reflects the national association (not the league) to which the club is affiliated. A flag is included for coaches who are of a different nationality to their team.
</p>
<meta property="mw:PageProp/toc">
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Group_A">Group A</h2></div>
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Czech_Republic">Czech Republic</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <a href="/wiki/Miroslav_Koubek" title="Miroslav Koubek">Miroslav Koubek</a>
</p><p>The <a href="/wiki/Czech_Republic_national_football_team" title="Czech Republic national football team">Czech Republic</a> announced a 54-man preliminary squad on May 12.<sup id="cite_ref-5" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-5"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>4<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The squad was reduced to 29 players on May 21.<sup id="cite_ref-6" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-6"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>5<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on May 31.<sup id="cite_ref-7" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-7"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>6<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Mexico">Mexico</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <a href="/wiki/Javier_Aguirre" title="Javier Aguirre">Javier Aguirre</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Mexico_national_football_team" title="Mexico national football team">Mexico</a> announced a 55-man preliminary squad on May 12.<sup id="cite_ref-8" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-8"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>7<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The squad was reduced to 51 players on May 23.<sup id="cite_ref-9" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-9"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>8<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on May 31.<sup id="cite_ref-10" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-10"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>9<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Group_B">Group B</h2></div>
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Bosnia_and_Herzegovina">Bosnia and Herzegovina</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <a href="/wiki/Sergej_Barbarez" title="Sergej Barbarez">Sergej Barbarez</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Bosnia_and_Herzegovina_national_football_team" title="Bosnia and Herzegovina national football team">Bosnia and Herzegovina</a> announced their final squad on May 11.<sup id="cite_ref-16" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-16"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>15<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup><sup id="cite_ref-17" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-17"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>16<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Osman_Had%C5%BEiki%C4%87" title="Osman Hadžikić">Osman Hadžikić</a> withdrew injured and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Mladen_Jurkas" title="Mladen Jurkas">Mladen Jurkas</a> on June 1.<sup id="cite_ref-18" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-18"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>17<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Nidal_%C4%8Celik" title="Nidal Čelik">Nidal Čelik</a> withdrew injured and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Arjan_Mali%C4%87" title="Arjan Malić">Arjan Malić</a> on June 11.<sup id="cite_ref-19" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-19"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>18<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Canada">Canada</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/United_States" title="United States"><img alt="United States" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/a/a4/Flag_of_the_United_States.svg/40px-Flag_of_the_United_States.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="12" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/a/a4/Flag_of_the_United_States.svg/60px-Flag_of_the_United_States.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="1235" data-file-height="650"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Jesse_Marsch" title="Jesse Marsch">Jesse Marsch</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Canada_men%27s_national_soccer_team" title="Canada men's national soccer team">Canada</a> announced a 32-man preliminary squad on May 25.<sup id="cite_ref-20" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-20"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>19<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on May 29.<sup id="cite_ref-21" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-21"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>20<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Marcelo_Flores" title="Marcelo Flores">Marcelo Flores</a> withdrew injured on May 31 and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Jayden_Nelson" title="Jayden Nelson">Jayden Nelson</a> on June 9.<sup id="cite_ref-22" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-22"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>21<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup><sup id="cite_ref-23" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-23"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>22<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Qatar">Qatar</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Spain" title="Spain"><img alt="Spain" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/9/9a/Flag_of_Spain.svg/40px-Flag_of_Spain.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/9/9a/Flag_of_Spain.svg/60px-Flag_of_Spain.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="750" data-file-height="500"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Julen_Lopetegui" title="Julen Lopetegui">Julen Lopetegui</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Qatar_national_football_team" title="Qatar national football team">Qatar</a> announced a 34-man preliminary squad on May 12.<sup id="cite_ref-24" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-24"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>23<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The squad was extended to 35 players on May 18,<sup id="cite_ref-25" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-25"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>24<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> then reduced to 28 players on May 25.<sup id="cite_ref-26" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-26"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>25<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on June 1.<sup id="cite_ref-27" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-27"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>26<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Brazil">Brazil</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Italy" title="Italy"><img alt="Italy" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/0/03/Flag_of_Italy.svg/40px-Flag_of_Italy.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/0/03/Flag_of_Italy.svg/60px-Flag_of_Italy.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="1500" data-file-height="1000"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Carlo_Ancelotti" title="Carlo Ancelotti">Carlo Ancelotti</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Brazil_national_football_team" title="Brazil national football team">Brazil</a> announced a 55-man preliminary squad on May 12.<sup id="cite_ref-30" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-30"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>29<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup><sup id="cite_ref-31" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-31"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>30<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on May 18.<sup id="cite_ref-32" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-32"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>31<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Wesley_Fran%C3%A7a" title="Wesley França">Wesley</a> withdrew injured and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/%C3%89derson_(footballer,_born_1999)" title="Éderson (footballer, born 1999)">Éderson Silva</a> on June 7.<sup id="cite_ref-33" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-33"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>32<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Morocco">Morocco</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <a href="/wiki/Mohamed_Ouahbi" title="Mohamed Ouahbi">Mohamed Ouahbi</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Morocco_national_football_team" title="Morocco national football team">Morocco</a> announced their final squad on May 26.<sup id="cite_ref-37" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-37"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>36<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Abde_Ezzalzouli" title="Abde Ezzalzouli">Abde Ezzalzouli</a> and <a href="/wiki/Nayef_Aguerd" title="Nayef Aguerd">Nayef Aguerd</a> withdrew injured and were replaced by <a href="/wiki/Amine_Sba%C3%AF" title="Amine Sbaï">Amine Sbaï</a> and <a href="/wiki/Marwane_Sa%C3%A2dane" title="Marwane Saâdane">Marwane Saâdane</a> on June 10, respectively.<sup id="cite_ref-38" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-38"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>37<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Scotland">Scotland</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <a href="/wiki/Steve_Clarke" title="Steve Clarke">Steve Clarke</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Scotland_national_football_team" title="Scotland national football team">Scotland</a> announced their final squad on May 19.<sup id="cite_ref-39" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-39"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>38<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Billy_Gilmour" title="Billy Gilmour">Billy Gilmour</a> withdrew injured on May 30,<sup id="cite_ref-40" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-40"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>39<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Tyler_Fletcher" title="Tyler Fletcher">Tyler Fletcher</a> on May 31.<sup id="cite_ref-41" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-41"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>40<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Iran">Iran</h3></div>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Iraq">Iraq</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Australia" title="Australia"><img alt="Australia" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/88/Flag_of_Australia_%28converted%29.svg/40px-Flag_of_Australia_%28converted%29.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="12" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/88/Flag_of_Australia_%28converted%29.svg/60px-Flag_of_Australia_%28converted%29.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="1280" data-file-height="640"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Graham_Arnold" title="Graham Arnold">Graham Arnold</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Iraq_national_football_team" title="Iraq national football team">Iraq</a> announced a 34-man preliminary squad on May 19.<sup id="cite_ref-82" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-82"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>81<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup><sup id="cite_ref-83" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-83"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>82<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on June 1.<sup id="cite_ref-84" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-84"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>83<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Ahmed_Yahya" title="Ahmed Yahya">Ahmed Yahya</a> withdrew injured with ​a hamstring injury and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Ahmed_Maknzi" title="Ahmed Maknzi">Ahmed Maknzi</a> on June 6.<sup id="cite_ref-85" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-85"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>84<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Argentina">Argentina</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <a href="/wiki/Lionel_Scaloni" title="Lionel Scaloni">Lionel Scaloni</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Argentina_national_football_team" title="Argentina national football team">Argentina</a> announced a 55-man preliminary squad on May 11.<sup id="cite_ref-91" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-91"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>90<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on May 28.<sup id="cite_ref-92" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-92"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>91<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Leonardo_Balerdi" title="Leonardo Balerdi">Leonardo Balerdi</a> withdrew due to a calf injury on June 6<sup id="cite_ref-93" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-93"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>92<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Marcos_Senesi" title="Marcos Senesi">Marcos Senesi</a> on June 11.<sup id="cite_ref-94" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-94"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>93<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Germany" title="Germany"><img alt="Germany" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/b/ba/Flag_of_Germany.svg/40px-Flag_of_Germany.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="14" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/b/ba/Flag_of_Germany.svg/60px-Flag_of_Germany.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="1000" data-file-height="600"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Ralf_Rangnick" title="Ralf Rangnick">Ralf Rangnick</a>

</p>

<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Morocco" title="Morocco"><img alt="Morocco" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/Flag_of_Morocco.svg/40px-Flag_of_Morocco.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/Flag_of_Morocco.svg/60px-Flag_of_Morocco.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="900" data-file-height="600"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Jamal_Sellami" title="Jamal Sellami">Jamal Sellami</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Jordan_national_football_team" title="Jordan national football team">Jordan</a> announced a 30-man preliminary squad on May 17.<sup id="cite_ref-98" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-98"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>97<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The squad was reduced to 28 players on May 27.<sup id="cite_ref-99" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-99"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>98<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> Their final squad was announced on June 2.<sup id="cite_ref-100" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-100"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>99<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Ibrahim_Sabra" title="Ibrahim Sabra">Ibrahim Sabra</a> withdrew injured on June 5<sup id="cite_ref-101" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-101"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>100<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Mohammad_Taha_(footballer)" title="Mohammad Taha (footballer)">Mohammad Taha</a> on June 8.<sup id="cite_ref-102" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-102"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>101<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/France" title="France"><img alt="France" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/c/c3/Flag_of_France.svg/40px-Flag_of_France.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/c/c3/Flag_of_France.svg/60px-Flag_of_France.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="900" data-file-height="600"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/S%C3%A9bastien_Desabre" title="Sébastien Desabre">Sébastien Desabre</a>

</p>

</p><p><a href="/wiki/Uzbekistan_national_football_team" title="Uzbekistan national football team">Uzbekistan</a> announced a 40-man preliminary squad on May 5.<sup id="cite_ref-111" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-111"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>110<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> The squad was reduced to 39 players on May 22 as <a href="/wiki/Ibrokhimkhalil_Yuldoshev" title="Ibrokhimkhalil Yuldoshev">Ibrokhimkhalil Yuldoshev</a> withdrew injured,<sup id="cite_ref-112" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-112"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>111<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> then to 30 players on May 24.<sup id="cite_ref-113" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-113"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>112<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> Their final squad was announced on June 2.<sup id="cite_ref-114" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-114"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>113<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Ghana">Ghana</h3></div>
<p>Coach: <span class="flagicon"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/Portugal" title="Portugal"><img alt="Portugal" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a8/Flag_of_Portugal_%28official%29.svg/40px-Flag_of_Portugal_%28official%29.svg.png" decoding="async" width="23" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a8/Flag_of_Portugal_%28official%29.svg/60px-Flag_of_Portugal_%28official%29.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="900" data-file-height="600"></a></span></span> <a href="/wiki/Carlos_Queiroz" title="Carlos Queiroz">Carlos Queiroz</a>
</p><p><a href="/wiki/Ghana_national_football_team" title="Ghana national football team">Ghana</a> announced a 28-man preliminary squad on May 25.<sup id="cite_ref-117" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-117"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>116<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Alexander_Djiku" title="Alexander Djiku">Alexander Djiku</a> withdrew injured and was replaced by <a href="/wiki/Derrick_Luckassen" title="Derrick Luckassen">Derrick Luckassen</a> on June 1.<sup id="cite_ref-118" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-118"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>117<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> They announced their final squad on June 2.<sup id="cite_ref-119" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-119"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>118<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
</p>

<ul><li>None of the squads are made up entirely of players from the countries' domestic leagues. The <a href="/wiki/Qatar_national_football_team" title="Qatar national football team">Qatar</a> and <a href="/wiki/Saudi_Arabia_national_football_team" title="Saudi Arabia national football team">Saudi Arabia</a> squads have 25 players from their respective leagues.<sup id="cite_ref-FIFAstats_121-4" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-FIFAstats-121"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>120<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup></li>
<li>The <a href="/wiki/Cape_Verde_national_football_team" title="Cape Verde national football team">Cape Verde</a>, <a href="/wiki/Cura%C3%A7ao_national_football_team" title="Curaçao national football team">Curaçao</a>, <a href="/wiki/DR_Congo_national_football_team" title="DR Congo national football team">DR Congo</a>, <a href="/wiki/Ivory_Coast_national_football_team" title="Ivory Coast national football team">Ivory Coast</a>, <a href="/wiki/Senegal_national_football_team" title="Senegal national football team">Senegal</a> and <a href="/wiki/Uruguay_national_football_team" title="Uruguay national football team">Uruguay</a> squads don't include any players employed by clubs in their home country.<sup id="cite_ref-FIFAstats_121-5" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-FIFAstats-121"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>120<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Uruguayan_football_league_system" title="Uruguayan football league system">Uruguay league</a> is the only domestic league represented at the tournament which doesn't provide any player for their national team.</li>
<li>The <a href="/wiki/Canada_men%27s_national_soccer_team" title="Canada men's national soccer team">Canada</a> and <a href="/wiki/New_Zealand_men%27s_national_football_team" title="New Zealand men's national football team">New Zealand</a> squads both include players employed by domestic clubs, but no players employed in the <a href="/wiki/Canadian_soccer_league_system" title="Canadian soccer league system">Canadian</a> or <a href="/wiki/New_Zealand_football_league_system" title="New Zealand football league system">New Zealand</a> domestic league systems. All Canadian domestic players play for Canadian teams in the American <a href="/wiki/Major_League_Soccer" title="Major League Soccer">Major League Soccer</a>; all New Zealand domestic players play for New Zealand teams in the Australian <a href="/wiki/A-League_Men" title="A-League Men">A-League Men</a>.</li>
<li>The <a href="/wiki/Netherlands_national_football_team" title="Netherlands national football team">Netherlands</a> squad has the most players from a single foreign federation, with 15 players employed in <a href="/wiki/English_football_league_system" title="English football league system">England</a>.</li>
<li>Of the countries not represented by a national team at the tournament, <a href="/wiki/Italian_football_league_system" title="Italian football league system">Italy's league</a> provided the most squad members, with 71.<sup id="cite_ref-FIFAstats_121-6" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-FIFAstats-121"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>120<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup></li>
<li>The lowest leagues on a domestic pyramid to be represented at the tournament are <a href="/wiki/National_League_(division)" title="National League (division)">National League</a>, the English fifth tier, and <a href="/wiki/Oberliga_Rheinland-Pfalz/Saar" title="Oberliga Rheinland-Pfalz/Saar">Oberliga</a>, the German fifth tier. They are represented by New Zealand player <a href="/wiki/Tommy_Smith_(footballer,_born_1990)" title="Tommy Smith (footballer, born 1990)">Tommy Smith</a> (<a href="/wiki/Braintree_Town_F.C." title="Braintree Town F.C.">Braintree Town</a>) and Haiti player <a href="/wiki/Josu%C3%A9_Duverger" title="Josué Duverger">Josué Duverger</a> (<a href="/wiki/FC_Cosmos_Koblenz" title="FC Cosmos Koblenz">Cosmos Koblenz</a>), respectively.</li></ul>
